title: Potion Storm
description: This mod is a fun challenge which will make it rain potions from the sky. Can you survive?
body:
This mod is a fun challenge which will make it rain potions from the sky. The potions are randomized, although helpful potions like instant health were replaced with harmful ones like instant damage. You can customize the amount of potions that fall, and the radius around each player that they use.

Commands: PotionDeathrayOn, PotionHeavyRainOn, PotionRainCustom, PotionRainOn, and PotionRainOff.

Can you survive the potion storm?

Showcase video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vlZkdljdgEE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vlZkdljdgEE)
